title: Fix login bug with OAuth provider
body:
## Problem

Users are unable to log in when using OAuth with Google.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to /login
2. Click "Sign in with Google"
3. Observe the 500 error

## Expected

Successful redirect to dashboard after OAuth flow.

## Notes

This appears to be related to the token expiry logic introduced in #39.
The `refresh_token` handler is not properly checking the `exp` claim.

See also: https://github.com/example/repo/issues/39

comments.body:
> Fix login bug with OAuth provider

I can reproduce this. The issue is in `token_refresh.rs` line 47.
I looked into this. The `exp` claim check is off by one — we're comparing against `now` instead of `now + buffer`.

> I looked into this.

Agree with carol's analysis. Here's a patch: `if exp > now + 60 { ... }`
PR is up at #45. Please review.
